## Checklist

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`eigenscript tests/test_cpu.eigs`, `eigenscript tests/test_memory.eigs`)
- [ ] The Blargg suites still pass (`tests/run_blargg_cpu_instrs_suite.sh`,
      `tests/run_blargg_timing_suite.sh`) — or note why they weren't run
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] Any EigenScript runtime/language gap the change surfaced is filed upstream
      in [EigenScript](https://github.com/InauguralSystems/EigenScript/issues) and
      logged as a `GAP-DMG-NNN` in [GAPS.md](../GAPS.md)
